titleStmt.title: SII 9.196: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 196. (A.R. No. 819 of 1922.) ON A PILLAR SET UP OPPOSITE THE CHENNAKESVARA TEMPLE AT KOMMURU, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 43, Viḷambi, Pushya, śu. 5, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. Pushya śu. 5 of Viḷambi corresponded to A.D. 1118 December 19 Thursday, not Monday, and Uttarāyaṇasankramana in that year fell on December 25. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that, while the Mahāsāmāntādhipati Mahaprachaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka Anantapālayya was ruling over Vēṅgi fourteenthousand, a certain Nāyaka made a gift of gadyāṇas 6 for keeping a perpetual light before god Agastēśvaradēva of Kommūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bha(ṁ)mūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastibhuvanāsraya śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāsrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva
ra vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi samadhigata
paṁcamahāsabda mahāsāma(ṁ)
ntādhipati mahāpraca(ṁ)ṇḍa
daṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavara
dāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ
nuḍidumattannaṁ gōtrapavi
traṁ parāṁganāputraṁ tureya
rēvaṁta vairikritānta sāhasō
ttuṁgaṁ Ayyanasiṁgaṁ nāmādisa
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
numahāpradhānaṁ bhāṇasave
rggaḍe maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyaka
Anantapāḷaiyyaṁgaḷu bēṁgi pa
dinālkusāsiramumaṁ
duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapra
pāḷaneyi(ṁ)ndā
ttamire dale
ḷaga
rggada
ḷa vadāna ko(ṁ)
mmūra śrīmadagastē
svaradēvargge . ©
kētapūṁṭanāvaya
śrīmaṁcāḷukyavikramava
riṣada 43 neya viḷaṁ
bisaṁvatsarada puṣya sudda
paṁcami sōmavāra Utta
rāyaṇasaṁkramaṇani
mityadalu Akhaṇḍanaṁdā
dīvigege koṭṭa Uttama
na ponnu gadyāṇa
Āṟu Aṁkadoḷaṁ
gadyāṇa 6 Ī dharmma
ko(ṁ)mmūra mūnūrvva
ruṁ naḍasuvaru I dharmma
vanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisida
vaṁ gaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāsi
ra kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagina
luṁ ponnuṁ māṇikadalu kaṭṭi
sakaḷavēdapāragarappa
hmaṇarige koṭṭa phaḷa
ḷidātaṁ sāsira kavi
gaṁgeyalu Aḷidā
svadattaṁ parada
rēta ṣaṣṭhi
rṣasa
jāyatē krimi
Ōṁ namaḥ
kommaṇā
likitaṁ
Digital edition of SII 9.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
